title: calystegia tomentosa
intro: Calystegia tomentosa, also known as the woolly false bindweed or woolly hedge bindweed, is a perennial plant species within the morning glory family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Calystegia tomentosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
